free_text: Elastic Scattering of Protons from Mg24
Magnetic analyzer used to select proton groups.
Thin films of MgF2, enriched in 24Mg, evaporated onto
Ag, Ca, Cu, Fe, Na, Si contaminants <0.1% each.
Brass cylinder with insulated molybdenum wire
anode filled with a mixture of argon and 2% CO2.
Differential cross sections determined by assuming
that scattering was Rutherford below 0.8 MeV.
Target thickness 2.3 keV for 1-MeV protons below 0.85
Ratio to Rutherford cross section calculated for
